desc: Track foods introduced to your baby with dates and reactions. Stores locally in the browser.

name: posty
desc:
posty is a fast, simple HTTP client for the command line.
Built in Go as a lightweight alternative to Postman.
fancy 'cURL' that supports Postman collections

name: mdv
desc: mdv is a local markdown editor + live preview app shipped as a single Go binary. allows for local live collaboration with your agent(s) through markdown files
